objects.text: A professional writer with over 8 years experience developing copy content that effectively engages and builds digital audiences. Known for being a team player and an asset to any brainstorm session. Looking for work opportunities where I can improve as a writer and editor.

• Wrote, reviewed and edited eye-catching content across all platforms, including (but not limited) to advertising, websites, social media, email newsletters, brochures and direct mail.
• Ensured all copy was accurate and of the highest editorial standards and maintained the brand's tone of voice.
• Contributed to creative brainstorms for campaign activations, events and marketing content.
